# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React single-page application (SPA) built with TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Core Technologies
- **React 18**: Component-based UI framework with hooks
- **TypeScript**: Type-safe JavaScript for better developer experience
- **Vite**: Fast build tool and development server
- **React Router DOM**: Client-side routing
- **Supabase**: Backend-as-a-Service for database and authentication
- **TanStack Query**: Data fetching and caching library
- **shadcn/ui**: UI component library built on Radix UI primitives
- **Tailwind CSS**: Utility-first CSS framework

## Application Structure

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing and providers

### Key Components
- **AppLayout** (`src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`): Main layout wrapper with sidebar and topbar
- **AppSidebar** (`src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`): Navigation sidebar with collapsible functionality
- **TopBar** (`src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`): Header component displaying current page title
- **BeudoxLogo** (`src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`): Logo component with variant support
- **NavLink** (`src/components/NavLink.tsx`): Enhanced NavLink component for routing

### UI Components
The application uses shadcn/ui components extensively, including:
- Form components (input, select, checkbox, etc.)
- Layout components (accordion, tabs, dialog, etc.)
- Data display (table, chart, avatar, etc.)
- Feedback components (toast, alert, progress, etc.)

### Routing & Navigation
- Uses React Router with BrowserRouter
- Protected routes with authentication checks
- Route-based page titles in TopBar
- Sidebar navigation with active state indicators

### Authentication
- Supabase-based authentication
- AuthProvider context for session management
- ProtectedRoute component for route guarding
- Automatic redirects based on authentication state

### Data Management
- TanStack Query for server state management
- Supabase client for database operations
- Custom hooks for authentication state

## Database Schema

The application uses Supabase as the backend, with the following key entities:
- **Employees**: User profiles and information
- **Attendance**: Time tracking and records
- **Leave**: Leave requests and approvals
- **Payroll**: Salary and compensation data
- **Projects**: Project management and tracking
- **HR Policies**: Document storage and management

## Configuration

### Environment Variables
- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: Supabase project URL
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`: Public Supabase API key
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID`: Supabase project identifier

### Build Configuration
- Vite config with React SWC plugin
- Path aliases (@/ for src/)
- Development server on port 8080
- Component tagging for development

### Development Tools
- ESLint for code linting
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing
- TypeScript for type checking

## Key Patterns & Conventions

### Component Structure
- Functional components with hooks
- TypeScript interfaces for props
- Consistent naming conventions
- Separation of UI and business logic

### State Management
- Local component state with useState
- Server state with TanStack Query
- Authentication state with context

### Styling
- Tailwind CSS classes
- CSS custom properties for theming
- Responsive design with Tailwind breakpoints

### File Organization
- Feature-based organization in pages/
- Shared components in components/
- Utilities in lib/
- Types in types/

## Current Implementation Status

The application has a complete navigation structure and layout, but most feature pages are not yet implemented. Currently active routes:
- `/login`: Authentication page
- `/forgot-password`: Password recovery
- `/dashboard`: Main dashboard (protected)
- Other routes in sidebar are placeholders

## Future Development

Based on the navigation structure, planned features include:
- Employee management system
- Attendance tracking
- Leave management
- Payroll processing
- Financial dashboards
- Project management
- HR policy management
- Notification system
- Settings panel
